summary: 8 film announcements, 6 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: How The Cookie Crumbles
film.talent: Giorgia Whigham, Trevor Wallace, Alyssa Milano, Shea Whigham
film.announcement: R-rated comedy film with ensemble cast announced; Jack Wigham among producers.

film.title: Kaet Might Die
film.talent: Jimmi Simpson, Ben Wang, Zosia Mamet
film.announcement: Dark comedy film directed by Mercedes Bryce Morgan with new cast additions announced.

film.title: Hollow
film.talent: Sydney Sweeney, Lindsey Anderson Beer (writer-director), LuckyChap (producer)
film.announcement: Sony lands Sleepy Hollow package with Sydney Sweeney starring; Lindsey Anderson Beer writing and directing with LuckyChap producing.

film.title: The Drill
film.announcement: School shooting-themed dark comedy film starring Rowan Blanchard, written and directed by Millicent Hailes.

film.title: I Want To Feel Fun
film.announcement: Improvised indie comedy film starring Michaela Watkins, written by Jessica Sanders.

film.title: Bender
film.talent: Bill Burr, Chris O'Dowd, Ruari Spooner
film.announcement: Comedy film with cast including Harry Potter series star Ruari Spooner joining Bill Burr and Chris O'Dowd.

film.title: Mussau: The First Song
film.announcement: Indigenous missionary biopic to shoot in Papua New Guinea with Indian National Film Award winner Bijukumar Damodaran directing.

film.title: Wilson Shedd
film.talent: Amanda Seyfried, Scoot McNairy, Tim Blake Nelson (director)
film.announcement: Dark film from director Tim Blake Nelson starring Amanda Seyfried and Scoot McNairy.

tv.title: Jakarta
tv.announcement: Multi-generational crime series starring Iko Uwais with director Albert Hughes attached, produced by Alcon Entertainment.

tv.title: Stuart Fails To Save The Universe
tv.talent: John Ross Bowie, original Big Bang Theory leads
tv.announcement: Big Bang Theory spinoff adds John Ross Bowie's Kripke character to original three leads in nod to Lost in Space.

tv.title: God of War
tv.announcement: Prime Video series to recast lead Kratos role after Ryan Hurst suffers injury on set.

tv.title: Boys of Tommen
tv.announcement: Series casts Jamie Schneider as Patrick Feely and James Craven as Pierce O'Neill.

tv.title: The Lords' Day
tv.talent: Annabel Scholey, Damson Idris, Harry Lawtey
tv.announcement: Netflix thriller series adds Annabel Scholey alongside Damson Idris and Harry Lawtey.

tv.title: Queenstown
tv.announcement: Netflix unveils Queenstown as its first New Zealand original series.
